Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I spent time with Maiko on the playground.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}My tummy's grumbling! Can we go to Wilduck?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 13 13 15 110}Yaaay! You're the best! I wonder what the daily burger is today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}But I'm too hungry to play! Let's go eat![n]{f 1 1}
